description: Compare current state to a target, threshold, SLA, or policy requirement and quantify the gap. Identifies where performance falls short and decomposes root causes using causal attribution.

transformations: compute delta = target - actual per metric
rank gaps by magnitude (largest gap first)
identify metrics closest to target (near-miss) vs furthest (critical gap)

cce_config.uses: root cause decomposition via Shapley attribution — identify upstream drivers of each gap

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics with clear target/threshold definitions; deprioritize trend-only metrics without a computable target
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric MUST include: target_value (policy/SLA/company target), current_value (latest observed), gap_delta (target - current), gap_pct ((target - current)/target * 100). If target_value is not explicitly available, infer from policy defaults or flag as 'target_unknown'.
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: use causal edges to identify upstream drivers of each gap; for the largest gaps, trace back through the causal graph to find actionable intervention points

penalty_rules: penalize metrics without a computable target (-0.15)
penalize trend-only metrics for current_state intent (-0.10)
penalize metrics with no delta/gap computation possible (-0.10)
boost_rules: boost metrics with explicit policy/SLA thresholds (+0.10)
boost metrics aligned with causal terminal nodes (+0.05)
boost metrics where gap > 10% of target (+0.05)
